features.title: Zone-Based Galaxy Layout
features.summary: BUILT. Galaxy split into 9 zone classes (core, inner_ring, mid_ring, outer_ring, frontier, deep_space, home, adventure, transit) with ZonePolicyService enforcing security_class and reward multipliers per zone. Difficulty scaling from 0.3x (home) to 2.0x (deep_space). worldPolicyService builds default policies. Sprint scope: hardening/integration of existing implementation, not a rewrite.

features.title: Player Home Sectors (Homesteads)
features.summary: Home sectors exist as zone_class: home with 0.3x difficulty, level 1-2 NPCs. is_starting_sector field exists on Sector model but not actively used for player spawning. Needs: player spawn assignment logic, resource planet generation, NPC port, jump points to hubs. Owner + alliance only. One-time Starter Packs (not subscription-tied) for extra sectors.

features.title: Universe Scaling Config
features.summary: BUILT. Universe config supports initialSectors, spiralArms, galaxyShape, galaxyRadius. Config exposed at GET /api/admin/universe/config. Admin can regenerate via POST /api/admin/universe/generate. Environment variables: UNIVERSE_SEED, INITIAL_SECTORS, SPIRAL_ARMS, GALAXY_SHAPE, GALAXY_RADIUS. Default: 200 systems, spiral shape, radius 500.

features.title: Zone Difficulty Scaling
features.summary: Zone-based difficulty partially implemented: zoneDifficulty config defines NPC stat multipliers (0.3x-2.0x) and level ranges per zone. behaviorTreeService applies difficulty modifier. Missing: purchasable private Adventure Sectors, AI-powered NPCs with bounded memory, dynamic quests per zone. Sprint scope: wire remaining zone-difficulty into NPC spawning and reward logic.

features.title: Space Phenomena & Hazard Presentation
features.summary: Sector-level space phenomena with gameplay effects and player-facing presentation. Ion storms, nebulae, asteroid fields, solar flares, and gravity wells influence travel, combat, and mining. Rendered on galaxy map and system views.

features.title: Portals + Static Wormholes
features.summary: BUILT. SectorConnection.connection_type includes wormhole with lane_class: wormhole and instant_transit flag. worldPolicyService handles wormhole traversal. Static wormholes work for long-distance travel. Missing: Player Portal destination picker modal, portal ownership mechanics. Sprint scope: add player-owned portals on top of existing wormhole infrastructure.

features.title: Unstable Wormholes (Adventure Access)
features.summary: Temporary wormholes to adventure clusters lasting DAYS. Auto-teleport home on close (non-bound cargo dropped as salvage at origin to prevent smuggling). 5-10 active at once. Admins can launch event wormholes on the fly.

features.title: Jump Drive Component
features.summary: Config defines JUMP_DRIVE component type with 3 tiers (Prototype, Standard, Experimental). Component can be equipped to ships. Missing: actual jump mechanic — movement is still adjacent-sector-only via isAdjacent() check. Needs: multi-sector jump service, cooldown timer, fuel cost calculation, zone policy validation for jump destinations.

features.title: Player-Built Gates + Commercial Portals
features.summary: Gate connection_type exists in SectorConnection model and config, treated like wormholes with different lane_class. Missing: gate-specific mechanics (permissions, toll systems, activation, construction, destruction). Three planned tiers: Personal gates (home-to-owned), Corporation gates (tolls, PvP-destructible), Commercial portals with 10 Space Hub types.

features.title: Protected Space Lanes
features.summary: BUILT. lane_class: protected with access_mode field for access control. combatPolicyService.resolveEntryProtection() grants temporary invulnerability on entry (15s default via travelProtectionDefaultMs). Safe but longer routes connecting home to Core and Core hubs. Sprint scope: hardening/integration, not a rewrite.

features.title: Route Planner (Weighted Pathfinder)
features.summary: Currently implemented (BFS, client-side). Click a distant sector to see the shortest path with animated cyan overlay and hop count. Uses BFS on adjacency map.

features.title: PvP Zone Enforcement
features.summary: BUILT. Sector.security_class enforces protection levels: protected (core/home), pve (inner/mid ring), contested (outer ring), pvp (frontier/deep space). worldPolicyService.buildDefaultSectorPolicy() drives enforcement. Reward multipliers: Core 1x, Inner 1.15x, Mid 1.25x, Outer 1.4x, Frontier 1.75x, Deep Space 2.1x. Sprint scope: hardening/integration, not a rewrite.

features.title: PvP Zone Reward Multipliers
features.summary: Zone-specific reward multipliers already applied via rule_flags.reward_multiplier: Core 1x → Deep Space 2.1x. Partially implemented in combat/trade reward paths. Missing: exclusive rare crafting materials and ship components only in PvP space, diminishing returns for same-target kills, alt-account detection signals, reward journaling with idempotency keys.

features.title: Anti-Griefing Design
features.summary: 6-8 wide entry corridors into PvP, 30-second invuln buffer on entry. Tourist Pass (20 min immunity, in-game currency or store). Tourists cannot enter owned sectors. Anti-scouting restrictions.

features.title: Neutral Safe Harbors in PvP Space
features.summary: Partially implemented: safe_harbor flag in sector.rule_flags with entry protection via combatPolicyService. travelProtectionDefaultMs grants invulnerability on entry. Missing: neutral station docking, repair/refuel services without trading, forward operating base mechanics. Current safe harbors are zone-level, not station-level.

features.title: Offline Ship Protection
features.summary: BUILT. raidProtectionService.isOwnerOfflineProtected() checks last_login timestamp with configurable threshold. Raid cooldowns and repeated-attacker throttling via ColonyRaidProtection model. PlayerProtectionState model tracks protection windows. Sprint scope: tune protection thresholds and add auto-dock/auto-recall mechanics.

features.title: NPC Foundation Fixes (F0-F5)
features.summary: AI NPC foundation exists: 7 phases complete (Foundation, Behavior Trees, Dialogue, Tick, WebSocket, Admin, Chat UI). Provider-agnostic AI (Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, Grok, NVIDIA, OpenRouter, Local). However, 6 foundation blockers identified: F0 per-player sessions (NpcConversationSession needed), F1 persistent combat targets, F2 live event pipeline (server doesn't emit hails/dialogue events), F3 dialogue action execution (side effects missing), F4 context quality, F5 E2E tests. Core illusion gap: 281 NPCs exist but 271 idle; client expects socket events server never emits.

features.title: Living Sector Presence
features.summary: BUILT. npcPresenceService.js generates ambient beats: proactive hails, warnings, offers per NPC type (TRADER, PATROL, PIRATE, BOUNTY_HUNTER, PIRATE_LORD). 3-min hail cooldown, 2-min presence beat cooldown. Delivered via Socket.io to players in sector. Sprint scope: increase beat variety, wire into system view live updates, add ambient NPC beats every 3-5 min in populated sectors.

features.title: Actionable Service NPCs & Contracts
features.summary: BUILT. Dialogue menu options tied to NPC types: TRADER (buy/sell/ask_rumors), PATROL (report_crime/ask_safety), PIRATE (plead/bribe/threaten). Per-player sessions via NpcConversationSession model. AI integration via dialogueService.js. Sprint scope: ensure all menu actions produce gameplay consequences — Buy/Sell opens trade UI, Report Crime creates records, bounty contracts create missions, bribes process payments.

features.title: NPC Memory & Relationship Summaries
features.summary: BUILT. NpcMemory model stores per-player trust/fear/respect scores (-1 to 1 range). npcMemoryService.recordInteraction() updates scores and stores memory bullets (max 10). Memory decay: DECAY_RATE 0.02, threshold 24 hours. Sprint scope: greeting adaptation based on relationship, pricing adjustments from trust, relationship indicators in chat header.

features.title: Faction & Clan Territory Presence
features.summary: BUILT. NPCs have faction field (5 factions), sector NPC presence reflects faction with color-coded badges. npcPresenceService has faction-specific dialogue beats. Patrol density high in core, pirates in frontier/deep_space. Sprint scope: clan-tagged pirate presence, rotating territory events (convoys, sweeps, tolls), map overlays tied to territory.

features.title: NPC Clan Territory & Raider Economy
features.summary: Not yet implemented. No NPC clan model or clan_id field exists. NPCs spawn individually, not as organized groups. Needs: NPC Clan model (clan hierarchy, size, territory), clan-based spawning logic, raid economics (bribe, hire, destroy raiders). Raider bases should be destructible and respawn elsewhere.

features.title: Zone-Scaled Raid Frequency
features.summary: Not yet implemented. Only player-initiated raids exist (colonyRaidService.js, groundCombatService.js). Generic pirate raids via triggerRaid() exist but no coordinated NPC clan raids. Needs: zone-scaled raid frequency (Inner rare, Outer moderate, Frontier frequent), clan-organized raid parties.

features.title: Stronghold Clearing + Planet Boss Fights + POIs
features.summary: Not yet implemented. Requires NPC clan system (clan-spawning) as prerequisite. Needs: multi-sector stronghold clearing chains, planet boss fights with permanent raid immunity, regenerating POIs, party system for group content.

features.title: AI NPC Tactical Simulation & Tick Orchestration
features.summary: BUILT. behaviorTreeService.js provides decision logic, npcActionExecutor executes actions, tickService runs tactical (30s) and combat (15s) ticks. Single-unit simulation works. Socket events broadcast NPC state changes. Admin visibility via /api/admin/ai/stats and /ai/logs. Missing: multi-unit tactical simulations (clan-vs-player), scale testing for large NPC populations.

features.title: Adventure Sector System
features.summary: Partially implemented: zone_class adventure exists in Sector model with 1.75x difficulty multiplier, level 8-13 NPCs, 1.0 spawn density. sectorInstanceService handles instancing with TTL. Missing: adventure-specific quest logic, gated entry (party size/ship tier/sector key), periodic resets, adventure-only loot tables.

features.title: Derelict Capital Ship Exploration
features.summary: BUILT. DerelictBoardingView.jsx with Three.js voxel traversal via shared FirstPersonTraversalController. Interior blueprints define room layouts, interaction zones, and exit points. Reuses colony surface voxel engine with ship tileset. Sprint scope: expand room variety, add NPC encounters, environmental hazards, and loot mechanics.

features.title: Alien Hive Sectors
features.summary: Survival-style waves of escalating NPC enemies. Higher waves = better loot. Team roles (healer/tank/DPS) matter.

features.title: Nebula Navigation Challenges
features.summary: Environmental hazard sectors with damaging nebulae. Specific ship components (Nebula Shield, Radiation Plating) reduce damage. Gear-check mechanic. Hard to craft or store-purchasable.

features.title: Raid Bosses
features.summary: Single powerful NPC requiring coordinated fleet tactics. Multiple phases, special mechanics. Weekly reset. Top-tier loot.

features.title: Timed Resource Rushes
features.summary: Sector floods with rare materials for 15 minutes. Mixed PvPvE. Announced server-wide. Hub portals provide fast access from anywhere.

features.title: Ship Interior Traversal
features.summary: Players can physically enter and traverse their own ships using the shared first-person controller, interaction model, and HUD contract used by colony surfaces and derelict boarding.

features.title: Store Design Philosophy
features.summary: Design-only — no store system exists in codebase. Establishes rules: everything purchasable MUST be grindable. Formal entitlement taxonomy (permanent, consumable, cosmetic, convenience) with hard boundaries. One-time Starter Packs (not subscription-tied). Premium subscription for convenience only. Free players on the SAME map.

features.title: Cosmetic Store Items
features.summary: Partially implemented: cosmeticService.js and CosmeticUnlock model exist. Ship customization catalog includes hull colors, engine trails, skins, nameplates. Missing: purchasing mechanism (no store UI, no price catalog, no purchase flow). Cosmetics are unlockable but no store integration.

features.title: Homestead Expansion
features.summary: Buy up to 3 additional sectors (total 4). Add planets to sectors (cap 4-6). Templates: Mining Colony, Agricultural Haven, Fortress, Trade Hub. Premium gets 3 sectors included.

features.title: Convenience Items
features.summary: XP boosters, inventory expansion, fast travel tokens, auto-repair kits. External Storage Module (+50 cargo, no slot used, ship-size cap). All grindable.

features.title: Premium Currency (Star Gems)
features.summary: Partially implemented: User.subscription_tier field exists (free/premium/elite), used to gate voice chat features. No actual premium currency (Star Gems) model, no store to spend in, no conversion rates. Needs: StarGem model, purchase flow, grind-rate balancing, admin-editable specials, 3-day flash + 30-day extended sales.

features.title: Dynamic Supply/Demand Pricing
features.summary: BUILT. 33 commodities, 8 port types, 10-min economy ticks (600,000ms interval). pricingService.js calculates buy/sell prices based on stock ratio (scarcity drives prices), volatility (0.15-0.6 per commodity), and spreads. Price snapshots recorded every tick for 7-day history. Sprint scope: hardening/integration, not a rewrite.

features.title: 8+ Port Types (+ PvP Player Ports)
features.summary: BUILT. 8 port types: Trading Hub, Mining Outpost, Agricultural Station, Tech Center, Space Station, Fuel Depot, Medical Station, Black Market. Each with unique tax rates (2%-10%), produce/consume commodity lists. Black Market buys/sells all. Sprint scope: add PvP player-buildable ports (Casino, Arena, Bounty Board, etc.) on top of existing infrastructure.

features.title: Trading Interface + Profit Indicators
features.summary: BUILT. TradingPage.jsx with buy/sell interface, commodity browser, price display. Average cost basis tracking via Transaction history. Best Trades panel shows profitable opportunities. Sprint scope: add profit/loss indicators per commodity, separate Buy Max/Sell All buttons, commodity volume display.

features.title: Dynamic Economy Scaling
features.summary: Not yet implemented. Economy tick exists (10-min interval, restocks ports) but restock rates are static — they do NOT scale with regional player count. Needs: regional player count tracking, population-based restock formula, remote zone scarcity, explorer rewards in low-traffic zones.

features.title: Turn-Based Space Combat
features.summary: BUILT. combatService.js (498 lines): shields, armor, critical hits (10%, 2x damage), flee mechanics, companion logic. Max 50 rounds, 2% component degradation per round, 70% loot chance. Sprint scope: hardening/integration, not a rewrite.

features.title: Real-Time Combat System
features.summary: BUILT. realtimeCombatService.js (1,050 lines): full PvP combat with CombatInstance model, live turn tracking, PvP cooldowns, zone-based reward multipliers, WebSocket integration. combatPolicyService enforces safe harbors, PvP zones, entry protection. Sprint scope: hardening/integration, not a rewrite.

features.title: Ground Combat
features.summary: BUILT. groundCombatService.js (1,441 lines): 5 unit types (militia, marines, heavy_armor, mech, spec_ops), grid-based with terrain effects, cover bonuses, building defense bonuses. PvE raids via colonyRaidService + player invasions. Missing from PRD vision: Artillery and Air Support unit types. Sprint scope: add missing unit types, tune balance.

features.title: 6 NPC Types
features.summary: BUILT. 5 NPC types: PIRATE, PIRATE_LORD, TRADER, PATROL, BOUNTY_HUNTER. Each with AI personality traits, behavior trees, intelligence tiers, voice profiles. behaviorTreeService handles tactical decisions. Missing from PRD vision: Colony Workers (hireable NPCs for colony production). Sprint scope: add Colony Worker NPC type.

features.title: 15 Ship Types (incl. Construction Ship)
features.summary: BUILT. 13 ship types: SCOUT, MERCHANT_CRUISER, FREIGHTER, FIGHTER, CORVETTE, DESTROYER, CARRIER, COLONY_SHIP, INSTA_COLONY_SHIP, BATTLECRUISER, INTERCEPTOR, MINING_BARGE, EXPLORER. Each with hull/shield/fuel/cargo stats and 7 component slot types. Missing: Construction Ship (consumable, destroyed on project completion). Sprint scope: add Construction Ship, faction-specific hull configurations.

features.title: 8+ Component Types, 50+ Components
features.summary: BUILT. 40 components across 7 categories: weapons (9), shields (7), engines (6), scanners (5), cargo pods (5), armor (5), jump drives (3). Tiers 1-5 with progressive stat scaling. Missing from PRD vision: Research Modules, Artifact Components (Phase Cloak, Gravity Anchor, Chrono Stabilizer, Void Lens), Tractor Beams, Mining Lasers, Comm Arrays, Nebula Shields. Sprint scope: add missing component types.

features.title: Ship Designer (Marketing Funnel)
features.summary: MAJOR CONVERSION TOOL. Ship designer available to website VISITORS (no account needed). Over-the-top engaging experience that hooks visitors into finishing their build. Discount flagship on signup. Must be robust, hold attention, and guide completion. Sprint scope: hardening/integration of existing implementation, not a rewrite. UX gap: needs before/after stat comparison view when browsing components (see claudeplan.md P3).

features.title: Ship Cosmetic Customizer
features.summary: BUILT. cosmeticService.js with CosmeticUnlock model. Ship customization catalog: hull colors, accent colors, engine trails, decals, skins, nameplates. Live preview not yet implemented. Sprint scope: add visual ship preview that updates in real-time, PvP Paint Dock exclusive options.

features.title: Fleet System
features.summary: BUILT. fleetService.js (466 lines): multi-ship fleet management with fleet roles, ownership, ship pooling. Fleet creation, member management, fleet-level bonuses. Movement uses worldPolicyService for traversal checks. Sprint scope: UX improvements — explicit Create Fleet button, prominent fleet controls, attack warning system.

features.title: Planet Colonization
features.summary: BUILT. 10 planet types (terrestrial, oceanic, desert, volcanic, arctic, jungle, barren, gas_giant, crystal_world, tomb_world) with size (1-10), gravity, habitability, temperature. Colony Ship required. colonyService.js (459 lines) handles lifecycle, population growth, infrastructure level (0-10). Sprint scope: add 4 missing planet types (Forest, Swamp, Ruins, Radiated Ruins), Minecraft-style biome matching.

features.title: Colony Buildings (Blueprint + Freeform)
features.summary: BUILT. 21 building types: extraction (Surface Mine, Deep Core Drill, Quantum Extractor, Water Pump, Deep Well, Cryo Harvester), power (Solar Array, Geothermal Plant, Fusion Reactor), infrastructure (Habitat Module, Hydroponic Farm, Research Lab, Spaceport, Defense Grid, Entertainment Complex), manufacturing (Refinery, Component Factory, Chemical Plant), defense (Orbital Defense, Shield Generator, Garrison Barracks). colonyBuildingService.js with upgrade chains. Sprint scope: add Blueprint + Freeform building modes, empire-wide logistics dashboard.

features.title: Colony Surface Grid (Minecraft-Style)
features.summary: FLAGSHIP FEATURE. Two systems: 2D PixiJS (functional) + 3D Voxel Engine (Three.js, rendering fixed — greedy mesher winding order + texture atlas flipY corrected). First-person WASD controls with pointer lock. Phased delivery: deterministic terrain first, then camera modes, then blueprint system. Start 64x64, expansion tokens to 128x128 cap. Chunk-based loading.

features.title: Wonder System (Realm + Planet Limits)
features.summary: BUILT. wonderService.js (168 lines): 6 wonders with 5-phase construction: ORBITAL_ARRAY (scan_range), TRADE_NEXUS (trade_bonus), DEFENSE_MATRIX (sector_defense), SHIPYARD (ship_discount), RESEARCH_STATION (research_speed), GENESIS_DEVICE (habitability). Realm-limited (1 Genesis Device empire-wide). Sprint scope: add pre-existing discoverable wonders, colonization exclusivity.

features.title: No Hard Colony Limits
features.summary: No artificial cap. Soft pressure via maintenance scaling (colony 5 = ~2.8x cost, colony 10 = ~7.9x), crew requirements, defense burden. Wealthy endgame players can run 15+.

features.title: Crew System (Deep RPG Layer)
features.summary: BUILT. 13 crew species: 10 organic (HUMAN, VEXIAN, KRYNN, ZORATH, SYLPHI, GROX, NEXARI, THRELL, CRYSTALLID, VOID_WALKER) + 3 robotic (WORKER_BOT, COMBAT_DROID, SCIENCE_UNIT). crewBonusService.js applies stat multipliers (1.0-1.6x per skill). 4 crew roles: PILOT, ENGINEER, GUNNER, SCIENTIST. Sprint scope: add individual skill trees, clothing/equipment, crew gear crafting.

features.title: Crew Economy (Balanced Burden)
features.summary: BUILT. crewService.js (242 lines): species-based salary (50-200 credits/shift), maintenance costs for bots, skill-based salary multipliers. Processed in daily tick via tickService. Sprint scope: tune to ensure costs stay proportional to income, add auto-scaling.

features.title: Player Levels (1-20)
features.summary: XP table from 100 to 1M. 8 skills (Combat, Shield, Trade, Nav, Engineering, Leadership, Mining, Scanner). Skill points per level, max skill 10. Sprint scope: hardening/integration of existing implementation, not a rewrite. UX gap: no onboarding tutorial for new players (see claudeplan.md P0).

features.title: Tech Research Tree (Expanded)
features.summary: BUILT. 7 techs with prerequisite chains: ADVANCED_WEAPONS, ADVANCED_SHIELDS, CAPITAL_CLASS_SHIPS (requires both), DEEP_SCANNING, BASIC_CRAFTING, BASIC_AUTOMATION (requires BASIC_CRAFTING), ADVANCED_COLONIES. TechResearch model tracks per-player progress. Sprint scope: expand to 15+ techs covering portals, construction ships, crew skills, planetary mining, AI companions, PvP structures.

features.title: Crafting System (5 Blueprint Categories)
features.summary: BUILT. craftingService.js (327 lines): blueprint system with crafting job queue, work orders with time tracking. Requires BASIC_CRAFTING tech prerequisite. Sprint scope: expand to 5 categories (Ship Components, Buildings, Ships, Crew Gear, Artifacts), add special artifact blueprints from rare drops.

features.title: Mission System
features.summary: BUILT. missionService.js (561 lines): dynamic mission generation per port. Mission types: escort, delivery, combat (bounty/patrol). Real-time progress tracking. Sprint scope: expand to cover all skills and levels, add surface missions, crew missions, trade missions, exploration. Template/instance model for scaling from tutorials to endgame epics.

features.title: Client Achievement System
features.summary: BUILT. achievementService.js (194 lines): server-side achievement progress tracking, milestone rewards. 20+ achievements seeded (first_kill, combat_wins_10/50/200, survive_low_hull, etc.). AchievementsPage component with unlock tracking. Sprint scope: migrate remaining 12 localStorage prototypes to server, add event-driven progress from action-audit.

features.title: Endgame & Lifer Retention
features.summary: Critical: keep endgamers who "have everything." Server transfers with legacy rewards, cross-wipe bank vaults, prestige resets, over-the-top endgame adventures, competitive seasons, and community leadership roles.

features.title: Daily Quests
features.summary: Lightweight repeatable progression loop with daily quest generation, progress tracking, and reward claiming. Gives players daily reasons to return to colony gameplay.

features.title: Corporation System + Alliances
features.summary: BUILT. corporationService.js (501 lines): corp creation (50K cost), membership management, treasury, leaderboard rankings. Alliance system (cap 3-5 allies). Player-adjustable sector access: Corp Only, Corp+Allies, Public, or Locked. Sprint scope: hardening/integration, not a rewrite.

features.title: Player Messaging
features.summary: BUILT. messagingService.js (137 lines): direct player-to-player messaging with reply, unread count in sidebar. Sprint scope: hardening/integration, not a rewrite.

features.title: 5 Factions (Expandable)
features.summary: BUILT. 5 factions: Terran Alliance (trade), Zythian Swarm (combat), Automaton Collective (tech), Synthesis Accord (intelligence), Sylvari Dominion (exploration). factionService.js (135 lines) with FactionStanding model for rep tracking. Faction CSS theming via body[data-faction] variables. Architecture supports easy addition — config + art + CSS tokens only.

features.title: Community Events
features.summary: BUILT. communityEventService (242 lines): event creation, player contributions toward collective goals, event leaderboards. Admin-only event creation via eventRoutes. Sprint scope: hardening/integration, not a rewrite.

features.title: Corporation Territory Claims
features.summary: Not yet implemented. Sector.owner_corporation_id field exists but no active territory control mechanics. Needs: control structure placement in public sectors, corp territory bonuses, allied corp shared bonuses, PvP contestability. Current access_mode (Corp Only/Corp+Allies/Public/Locked) provides foundation for territory access rules.

features.title: Interactive NPC Dialogue, Hails & Voice
features.summary: Player-facing NPC conversations with scripted menus, free-text AI fallback, proactive WebSocket hails, and optional voice I/O through provider-backed STT/TTS. Premium voice gating by subscription tier.

features.title: Faction Wars
features.summary: Persistent war records between factions with active war queries, combat-based score updates, and faction page presentation. Combat outcomes feed a visible strategic conflict layer.

features.title: Leaderboards
features.summary: Ranked leaderboards for trading volume, combat wins, wealth, corporation metrics, and exploration. 60-second cache, timeframe filters (daily/weekly/all_time), pagination. Pure aggregation over existing data.

features.title: 10+ Outpost Types
features.summary: BUILT. outpostService (159 lines): outpost creation, trading, management. Current types functional. Sprint scope: expand from current to 10+ types (add Comm Relay, Mining Drone Hub, Repair Station, Nav Beacon, Smuggler Cache, Toll Gate, Research Probe).

features.title: Task Automation
features.summary: BUILT. automationService.js (322 lines): automated trade routes and mining runs with step-by-step execution. Pause/resume/cancel. Mission system integration. Sprint scope: hardening, add action-authority pipeline with budgets, cooldowns, and audit.

features.title: AI Agent Companion
features.summary: BUILT. agentService.js (317 lines): AgentAccount model with capabilities, balance, action audit logs. Agent API routes at /api/agent-api/ and /api/agents/ with API key auth, ABAC permissions, daily credit budgets, rate limiting. OpenClaw-compatible SKILL.md and tools.json. Frontend AgentPage with overview, permissions, settings, and activity log tabs.

features.title: 10 Artifact Types
features.summary: BUILT. artifactService.js (87 lines): 10 artifact types (Ancient Star Map, Alien Power Core, Precursor Data Crystal, Quantum Stabilizer, Bio-Enhancement Pod, Gravity Manipulator, Temporal Fragment, Void Crystal, Neural Interface, Fusion Catalyst). Rarity scaling 0.02-0.12. Functional bonuses: fuel efficiency, shield capacity, damage, scan range, speed, research speed.

features.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
features.summary: BUILT. useKeyboardShortcuts.js hook: 8 navigation shortcuts (D=Dashboard, S=Ships, M=Map, V=System, T=Trading, C=Combat, P=Progression, I=Messages). Esc closes dialogs, ? shows help overlay. Skips input fields and pointer-locked views (voxel).

features.title: Mobile Responsive Layout (PWA Priority)
features.summary: BUILT. TailwindCSS responsive classes throughout, layout adjusts for mobile. Touch event support exists for map interactions. Missing: comprehensive gesture support (swipe, pinch zoom), PWA manifest, offline capability, push notifications. Sprint scope: add PWA support and gesture controls.

features.title: Basic Accessibility
features.summary: Minimal implementation. Basic semantic HTML structure exists. Missing: comprehensive ARIA labels, alt text for images, screen reader optimization, keyboard-only navigation flow, color contrast verification. Sprint scope: systematic accessibility audit and remediation.

features.title: Faction-Colored UI Theming
features.summary: BUILT. CSS custom properties (--sw3-primary, --sw3-primary-dark, --sw3-primary-glow, --sw3-primary-alpha) defined per faction in index.css. App.jsx sets body[data-faction] attribute. effects.css holographic utilities (holo-panel, holo-button, holo-text, holo-sweep, terminal-*) all use CSS vars. Scrollbar themed. Tailwind accent-primary color alias added. Each faction gets unique border-radius.

features.title: Galaxy Map Canvas
features.summary: BUILT. Pure Canvas2D galaxy map (GalaxyMapCanvas.jsx) rendering ~200 systems with star class colors, hyperlane connections (color-coded by lane_class), fog-of-war (undiscovered sectors dimmed), ship badges, port indicators, faction dominance dots, fleet drag-select. Click to navigate, double-click for system view. Phenomena overlays. UX gaps: persistent mini-map widget and location bar needed for spatial awareness (see claudeplan.md P1). MiniMap.jsx partially exists.

features.title: In-Game Wiki (Web-Accessible)
features.summary: BUILT. 19 articles in docs/wiki/ (01-getting-started through 19-guide-colonization) covering all major game systems. Served at /wiki route. Sprint scope: keep expanding coverage, add screenshots, ensure SEO-friendly for organic traffic.

features.title: Toast Notification System
features.summary: BUILT. NotificationContext with success/info/warning/error types, max 5 visible, auto-dismiss (5s default). NPCHailNotification for NPC alerts. useSoundEffects hook for audio feedback (synthesized via Web Audio API). Missing: comprehensive notification center with history. Sprint scope: add notification history panel.

features.title: WebSocket Connection
features.summary: BUILT. socketService.js (526 lines): Socket.io with JWT auth on connection, max 3 sockets/user, chat rate limit (5 msg/10s). Room-based broadcasting (sector, faction, corporation). Events: sector NPCs, combat alerts, level-ups, achievements, NPC hails. Sprint scope: hardening/integration, not a rewrite.

features.title: Distributed Player Spawning
features.summary: Partially implemented: newbieProtectionMs and travelProtectionDefaultMs in anti-cheat config provide spawn protection window. Missing: explicit distributed spawning to 30-50 Core hubs by faction, load-balanced hub selection, Day 1 congestion prevention.

features.title: Sector Instance Limits
features.summary: BUILT. sectorInstanceService.js (209 lines): sector instance assignment with TTL, capacity enforcement. SectorInstanceAssignment model tracks user → sector → instance mappings. Ship movement assigns/releases instances. Missing: queue UX when capacity hit, configurable caps per zone type.

features.title: Action Audit & Abuse Detection
features.summary: BUILT. actionAuditService.js with ActionAuditLog model: logs allow/deny decisions for movement, PvP, trade, portal use. Admin query at /api/admin/action-audit with summaries. Anti-cheat foundation (AC-007) verified. Missing: time-partitioned retention (90-day hot), anomaly detection, comprehensive abuse flagging.

features.title: Asynchronous Job Queue & Scheduler
features.summary: BUILT. jobQueueService.js (366 lines): Job model with status tracking (pending, processing, completed, failed, dead). Retry logic with exponential backoff. Admin endpoints for job management. Missing: scheduled/deferred execution (run_at), dead-letter handling, integration with game systems (economy ticks, crafting completion, wormhole timers).

features.title: Live Ops Observability & Feature Flags
features.summary: Partially implemented: gameSettingsService.js (348 lines) provides in-memory cache for 70+ settings. Admin endpoints expose AI stats, NPC population, tick status, server runtime logs. runtimeMonitor.js tracks startup/shutdown/fault events. Missing: feature flags, kill switches, staged rollouts, structured metrics collection, alert rules.

features.title: Economic Credit Sinks
features.summary: Minimal implementation. Port taxes exist (2-10% per port type). Colony building/upgrade costs and crew salaries act as natural sinks. Missing: explicit sink mechanisms for wormhole fees, gate construction, PvP insurance, adventure entry costs, wonder construction, homestead expansion. No inflation monitoring dashboard.

features.title: Discovery & Fog of War
features.summary: BUILT. discoveryService.js (87 lines): PlayerDiscovery model tracks visited sectors per player. Fog reveals on visit. Client applies fog-of-war dimming on galaxy map for undiscovered sectors. Sprint scope: add scanner upgrade reveal (2-3 hops), star chart purchases from NPCs.

features.title: Unified Anti-Cheat & Anti-Exploit Architecture
features.summary: Foundation implemented via anti-cheat program (AC-001 through AC-010, all verified): combatPolicyService, combatCommandGuard, actionAuditService, PlayerProtectionState, SectorInstanceAssignment, TransferLedger, ColonyRaidProtection, economyAbuseService. Missing from unified architecture: device fingerprinting, bot detection, centralized anti-cheat service layer consolidating all checks.

features.title: GM/Moderation Tooling
features.summary: Comprehensive GM and moderation dashboard providing player reporting, appeal/dispute workflows, penalty escalation, chat moderation, live spectate, bulk ban tools, and full audit trail integration.

features.title: Server-Authoritative Achievement System
features.summary: Partially implemented: achievementService.js exists with 20+ seeded achievements, server-side progress tracking, and milestone rewards. Missing: full migration from 12 localStorage prototypes, event-driven progress from action-audit, cross-device sync, anti-fraud enforcement.

features.title: Player Reporting & Appeal System
features.summary: Player-facing reporting and appeals interface: in-game report buttons on profiles and death screens, categorized reports with evidence attachment, appeal submission from account settings, resolution notifications, and GM priority queue integration.

features.title: Admin Control Plane & Game Settings
features.summary: Secure in-game admin control plane for universe setup, AI configuration, NPC operations, tick visibility, and account-tier management. Persistent GameSetting model with in-memory cache, protected admin APIs, and multi-tab admin UI.

features.title: Server-Owner Difficulty & Support Tooling
features.summary: Expand admin MVP into full server-owner operations suite with difficulty sliders (XP, fuel, market volatility), player support tools (rescue, teleport, resurrect, ban), content management, and dynamic RBAC replacing the single is_admin flag.
